footer.slogan: Meray Global is dedicated to ensuring continuous supply chain stability across the physical commodity sector, consistently delivering strategic value and uninterrupted logistics to our global partners.

cookieBanner.title: Cookie Policy
cookieBanner.body: We use cookies to analyze traffic and optimize your experience. By clicking "Accept", you agree to our use of cookies.

notFoundPage.subtitle: Page not found
notFoundPage.body:
Sorry, we couldn't find the page you're looking for.
 It might have been moved or deleted.

errorPage.title: Something went wrong
errorPage.subtitle: We encountered an unexpected error on our end. Please try refreshing the page or contact support if the problem persists.
